content:
Ever been on a trip where everyone keeps asking:

"Who paid for lunch?"

"How much do I owe?"

"Can someone calculate everything?"

I've been there more times than I can count.

Instead of passing around spreadsheets or scrolling through chat messages, I decided to build Pay Splitter.

💡 The Idea

Pay Splitter is designed to make shared expenses simple.

Whether you're:

✈️ Traveling with friends

🏠 Sharing rent with roommates

🍕 Splitting restaurant bills

🎉 Organizing events

It keeps track of every expense and calculates exactly who owes whom.

✨ Features

👥 Create trips and groups

💰 Add shared expenses

🧮 Smart settlement calculation

🌍 Multi-currency support

📶 Offline mode

📱 Direct UPI QR payments

🔗 Share trips instantly

I'd Love Your Feedback

This project is continuously evolving, and I'm always looking for ideas to make it better.

If you've built a similar project—or have suggestions for new features—I'd love to hear your thoughts.

Happy coding! 🚀

P.S. If you'd like to try it:

🌐 Web: https://paysplitter-ai.netlify.app

📱 Android: https://pay-splitter.en.uptodown.com/android
